name: claudemax
description: Anthropic-native power-user harness for Claude Max subscribers. Multispec engine + parallel /goal + blind /verify on Opus 4.7. 29-skill catalog, bundled llm-dark-patterns hooks, two parallelism modes (SDK subagents + Claude Code Agent Teams).
_schemaNote: permissions.defaultMode is the canonical field per code.claude.com/docs/en/permissions (accessed 2026-05-20). NOTE: bypassPermissions in settings.json is necessary-but-not-sufficient — per code.claude.com/docs/en/permission-modes, the bare `claude` REPL still requires --dangerously-skip-permissions (or equivalent) on the launch CLI to actually enter bypass. Anthropic gates the bypass mode behind a launch flag by design. For 'type claude in terminal and skip permissions', users must add a shell alias: alias claude='claude --dangerously-skip-permissions'. The rest of this manifest follows the Claude Code plugin format introduced in v2.1.129; validate with `claude plugin validate plugin.json` once that command stabilizes. Plugin marketplace publication path: https://claudemarketplaces.com/
